web.title: [PDF] Tips for Hiring a Contractor - BBB
web.description: Verify Employees. Ask if employees and subcontractors are background checked, trained, and certified. Ask what ID to expect upon arrival.

web.title: BBB Tip: Hire a trusted roofing contractor to repair, replace roof
web.description: 7 tips to consider when hiring a roofer: · Rely on research and referrals. · Make sure you understand the full scope of the project. · Ask about clean-up and waste ...
